positive: A stylized, minimalist graphic illustration of a soaring winged fox fox in a triumphant pose, depicted with clean linework and strong negative space. The fox silhouette should be centered and composed against a backdrop of abstract cosmic nebula elements in deep indigo, vibrant cyan, and electric violet. Incorporate subtle geometric patterns and constellations connecting the wings and the landscape elements. The style must be hyper-detailed tattoo art merged with retro-futuristic poster design, emphasizing clean contrast, stark lines, and bold color blocking. High contrast, perfect symmetry, suitable for a single-color screen print application. Art Deco inspired, clean graphic design.
